included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrive in Wayanad & Spice Farms Walk
itinerary.description: Arrive in Wayanad. Explore the ancient rock engravings of Edakkal Caves and see the earthen Banasura Sagar Dam. Walk through cardamom and pepper plantations.

itinerary.title: Drive to Ooty & Nilgiri Tea Gardens
itinerary.description: Drive to Ooty. Walk in the sprawling tea gardens, visit the Doddabetta Peak for panoramic views, and enjoy a quiet boat ride on Ooty Lake.

itinerary.title: Mysore Palace & Brindavan Musical Fountains
itinerary.description: Drive down to Mysore. Visit the historic Chamundi Temple and the majestic Mysore Palace. Witness the beautiful evening musical fountain at Brindavan Gardens.

itinerary.title: Wonderla Theme Park Adventure & Departure
itinerary.description: Drive to Wonderla Amusement Park. Spend a full day of fun on the rollercoasters and water slides before transferring for your departure.

title: Wayanad, Ooty & Mysore: Heritage, Hills & Thrills
description: A comprehensive 4-day tour covering the best of South Indian hills, heritage, and entertainment. Trek the spice hills of Wayanad, ride the toy train in Ooty, tour the historic Mysore Palace, and scream on the rollercoasters of Wonderla.
highlights: Visit Edakkal Caves and Banasura Sagar Dam in Wayanad
Stroll through Ooty's tea gardens and Doddabetta Peak
Tour Mysore Palace and watch the musical fountain show
Enjoy a full day of excitement at Wonderla Amusement Park
